name: wll
description: Personal Copilot CLI plugin collection by weilueluo

metadata.description: Curated plugins for structured software delivery

plugins.name: deliver
plugins.description: Production multi-stage delivery pipeline. The deliver skill orchestrates exploration, planning, critique, implementation, testing, and review — with optional delegation to specialist agents, quality gates, and explicit correction paths.

plugins.name: plan
plugins.description: Transforms vague feature ideas into complete feature requests through structured clarification. The plan skill coordinates repository analysis, ambiguity detection, and iterative user clarification to produce fully resolved feature specifications with no open questions.

plugins.name: chats
plugins.description: Chat platform integrations. Skills for interacting with messaging platforms like WhatsApp — search conversations, send messages, manage contacts and groups, all from the CLI.

plugins.name: dev
plugins.description: Development skills — core engineering principles for AI-maintained codebases, production-grade frontend interfaces, and CodePen integration.

plugins.name: documents
plugins.description: Document processing skills for creating, editing, and manipulating various document formats including Word (.docx), PDF, PowerPoint (.pptx), Excel (.xlsx), and collaborative document co-authoring workflows.
